name: Deposit Account Agent
description: Handles customer questions about deposit accounts including checking and savings accounts. Can provide account balances, transaction history, and list accounts.

skills.name: Get Account Balance
skills.description: Get the current balance for a specific deposit account

skills.name: Get Transaction History
skills.description: Get recent transactions for a specific deposit account

skills.name: List Accounts
skills.description: List all deposit accounts for the customer

skills.name: Check Minimum Balance
skills.description: Check if total deposit balance meets a minimum threshold (for loan equity verification)
